oauth_browser.title: Bosch SingleKey ID Authorization
oauth_browser.description:
1. Left-click and open the authorization link [here]({auth_url})

2. Log in with your Bosch ID credentials

3. After login, the browser may stay on a redirection page. This is expected.

4. Open browser DevTools (F12) and switch to the Network tab.

5. Find the blocked request starting with 'com.bosch.tt.dashtt.pointt://app/login?code=...'

6. Right-click it and copy the full request URL.

7. Paste the complete URL below. The integration will extract the authorization code automatically.

data.code: Full redirect URL or authorization code

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Bosch CT200
reauth_confirm.description:
The stored refresh token was rejected by Bosch SingleKey ID and a new sign-in is required. The most common cause is that the same Bosch account was used to sign in again elsewhere (for example in the EasyControl mobile app), which invalidates older refresh tokens.

1. Left-click and open the authorization link [here]({auth_url})

2. Log in with your Bosch ID credentials

3. After login, the browser may stay on a redirection page. This is expected.

4. Open browser DevTools (F12) and switch to the Network tab.

5. Find the blocked request starting with 'com.bosch.tt.dashtt.pointt://app/login?code=...'

6. Right-click it and copy the full request URL.

7. Paste the complete URL below. The integration will extract the authorization code automatically.

data.code: Full redirect URL or authorization code

select_gateway.title: Select Bosch CT200
select_gateway.description: More than one unconfigured CT200 was found for this account. Select the device you want to add.

error.no_code: Please provide the authorization code from the redirect URL
error.invalid_code: Authorization code is invalid or expired. Please try again.
error.invalid_device: Selected device is invalid. Please choose one of the available CT200 devices.
error.network_error: Cannot connect to authentication server. Check your internet connection.
error.no_devices: No Bosch CT200 devices found for this account
error.reauth_device_mismatch: The signed-in Bosch account does not contain the originally configured CT200. Sign in with the same account that owns this device.

abort.already_configured: This Bosch CT200 is already configured
abort.reauth_unknown_entry: Could not find the original Bosch CT200 entry to re-authenticate.
